InstructionData.Title: Frn_MixScript
InstructionData.Author: LowrentTrent
InstructionData.Instructions:
INIT: alias d_halt d0 #Emergency Stop alias d_furnace d1 alias d_gasmix d2 #Gas mixer alias d_gasa d3 #Gas Analyser alias d_disp1 d5 #LED Display 1
alias r_0 r0 #not used alias r_chgprs r1 #Charge line pressure alias r_chgprsp r2 #Charge line percent alias r_halt r10 #Emergency Stop
define maxpress 5000 #Maximum pressure s d_gasa On 1 #Danger - must be turned on move r_chgprs 99999 #init s d_disp1 Mode 0 s d_disp1 Color 7 s d_disp1 Setting r_chgprs #debug display sleep 1 s d_disp1 Color 4 s d_disp1 Setting maxpress #show maxpress on boot sleep 1 s d_disp1 Color 1
START: l r_halt d_halt Setting breqz r_halt 2 # If halt == 0 skip next j SHUTDOWN # jump to shutdown l r_chgprs d_gasa Pressure #load from device div r_chgprsp r_chgprs maxpress #convert percent s d_disp1 Mode 1 #set percent mode s d_disp1 Setting r_chgprsp #update display % #s d_disp1 Setting r_chgprs #update display raw
brgt r_chgprs maxpress 3 #if over, jump 3 s d_gasmix On 1 j START s d_gasmix On 0 j START #sleep 10
SHUTDOWN: s d_disp1 Mode 0 s d_disp1 Setting 998 s d_gasmix On 0 s d_gasa On 1 l r_halt d_halt Setting breqz r_halt 2 #if halt == 0 skip next j START j SHUTDOWN EOF:
